title: A Session With Uncle Sidney - IV - And Makes Nursery Rhymes - 4 "It"
content:
A wee little worm in a hickory-nut
        Sang, happy as he could be, - 

    

     "O I live in the heart of the whole round world,
        And it all belongs to me!"
meaning:
"A Session With Uncle Sidney - IV - And Makes Nursery Rhymes - 4 "It"" is a quintessential example of James Whitcomb Riley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
